subject: One more ‘big reveal’ (for affiliates only)
body:
Mozination -

Good news: I'm giving away a lot of stuff on Saturday. And one, is extremely valuable.

Bad news: I only have limited amounts. (only 6% of people who registered could get one).

Good news: If you're on live, you will probably be able to get one. And if you email your audience immediately after - they will too.

Action item: I'd let your audience know that there's gonna be something at the very end & that you'll be emailing the links to them the moment the event is over. So they can have exclusive access.

In fact - I'm going to send you an email right before my presentation is over so you can get a jump on it for your audience.

Alex.

PS -  This is ON TOP OF my 4-year secret project. I know. Lots of goodies. But…only for people who show up because I will a) run out b) only give them to people there live with me.
